'''vowadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilish|oilish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilish|oilish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vowadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vowadithi|vowadithi]] || [[word:vowadiji|vowadiji]] || [[word:vowadishi|vowadishi]] || [[word:vowadiki|vowadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vowaduthuthu|vowaduthuthu]] || [[word:vowadujuju|vowadujuju]] || [[word:vowadushushu|vowadushushu]] || [[word:vowadukuku|vowadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vowaduthu|vowaduthu]] || [[word:vowaduju|vowaduju]] || [[word:vowadushu|vowadushu]] || [[word:vowaduku|vowaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vowadufthuf|vowadufthuf]] || [[word:vowadufjuf|vowadufjuf]] || [[word:vowadufshuf|vowadufshuf]] || [[word:vowadufkuf|vowadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vowadethe|vowadethe]] || [[word:vowadeje|vowadeje]] || [[word:vowadeshe|vowadeshe]] || [[word:vowadeke|vowadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vowadothotho|vowadothotho]] || [[word:vowadojojo|vowadojojo]] || [[word:vowadoshosho|vowadoshosho]] || [[word:vowadokoko|vowadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vowadotho|vowadotho]] || [[word:vowadojo|vowadojo]] || [[word:vowadosho|vowadosho]] || [[word:vowadoko|vowadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vowadofthof|vowadofthof]] || [[word:vowadofjof|vowadofjof]] || [[word:vowadofshof|vowadofshof]] || [[word:vowadofkof|vowadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfthÃŸf|vowadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfjÃŸf|vowadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfshÃŸf|vowadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfkÃŸf|vowadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vowadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vowadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vowadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vowadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfthÃŸf|vowadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfjÃŸf|vowadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfshÃŸf|vowadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfkÃŸf|vowadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfthÃŸf|vowadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfjÃŸf|vowadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfshÃŸf|vowadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vowadÃŸfkÃŸf|vowadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vowadÃḊthÃḊ|vowadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vowadÃḊjÃḊ|vowadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vowadÃḊshÃḊ|vowadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vowadÃḊkÃḊ|vowadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vowadathatha|vowadathatha]] || [[word:vowadajaja|vowadajaja]] || [[word:vowadashasha|vowadashasha]] || [[word:vowadakaka|vowadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vowadatha|vowadatha]] || [[word:vowadaja|vowadaja]] || [[word:vowadasha|vowadasha]] || [[word:vowadaka|vowadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vowadafthaf|vowadafthaf]] || [[word:vowadafjaf|vowadafjaf]] || [[word:vowadafshaf|vowadafshaf]] || [[word:vowadafkaf|vowadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vowadasha|vowadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vowadshÃḋsha|vowadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vowadrosha|vowadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vowadmusha|vowadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vowadyasha|vowadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govowadnkshÃḋsha|govowadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govowadnkrosha|govowadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govowadnkmusha|govowadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govowadnkyasha|govowadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vowawadasha|vowawadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vowawadshÃḋsha|vowawadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vowawadrosha|vowawadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vowawadmusha|vowawadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vowawadyasha|vowawadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govowawadnkshÃḋsha|govowawadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govowawadnkrosha|govowawadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govowawadnkmusha|govowawadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govowawadnkyasha|govowawadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vewÃḊdasha|vewÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vewÃḊdshÃḋsha|vewÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vewÃḊdrosha|vewÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vewÃḊdmusha|vewÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vewÃḊdyasha|vewÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govewÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|govewÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govewÃḊdnkrosha|govewÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govewÃḊdnkmusha|govewÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govewÃḊdnkyasha|govewÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vowfadasha|vowfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vowfadshÃḋsha|vowfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vowfadrosha|vowfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vowfadmusha|vowfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vowfadyasha|vowfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govowfadnkshÃḋsha|govowfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govowfadnkrosha|govowfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govowfadnkmusha|govowfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govowfadnkyasha|govowfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
